历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 63049 → 57969 → 55964 → 105580 → 120176. From 2021 to 2023, rankings fluctuated narrowly between 56,000 and 63,000. Starting in 2024, there was a cliff-like drop, and in 2025, it further dropped to about 120,000, with a cumulative drop of about 64,000 over the past two years, indicating a continuous decline in admission thresholds in Zhejiang. The enrollment plan for Qinghai University in Zhejiang's comprehensive category: 42 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 58 in 2024, 58 in 2025; for 2026 (enrollment plan document), it plans 49, a decrease of 9 from 2025, a reduction of about 15.5%. A reduction in enrollment means intensified competition, exerting upward pressure on rankings. Qinghai University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in recent years is approximately 170–200 (180th in 2021, 182nd in 2022, 173rd in 2024, 198th in 2025), placing it in the mid-to-late tier of 211 universities, with a stable overall level.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant positive or negative public opinion incidents; its Douyin school popularity ranking is 106th, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure; there is no data on abnormal filing records for this university, and overall application attention is not high.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, and Electrical Engineering have high social popularity, but the overall appeal of the university's majors is average; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Zhejiang college entrance exam is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% from about 291,000 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition and pushing rankings upward; Qinghai University is located in Qinghai Province, far from Zhejiang Province, and geographical preference factors have limited impact on Zhejiang candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant downward trend in rankings from 2024–2025, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 15.5%, and the substantial increase in Zhejiang's candidate pool of about 37.6%: the enrollment reduction exerts upward pressure on rankings, but the surge in candidate numbers significantly intensifies competition. Based on the 2025 baseline of 120176, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 111985, with a range of 111485–112485.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 111485–112485, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (e.g., Accounting Innovation Experimental Class, Electrical Engineering and Automation), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. When rankings are significantly better than the lower bound of the range, prioritize reaching for popular Tier 1 majors. The university has no A- or above discipline evaluation data; when choosing majors, it is advisable to combine personal interests with social popularity for a comprehensive judgment.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University's medical category in Zhejiang Province over the past five years are: 2021: 63277 (plan: 8), 2022: 54882 (plan: 7), 2023: 42216 (plan: 8), 2024: 105580 (plan: 9), 2025: 94299 (plan: 10). In 2024, the ranking dropped sharply from 42216 to 105580, and rebounded to 94299 in 2025. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 9, a decrease of 1 from 2025's 10, a reduction of about 10%, which will push the ranking upward (making it harder to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a key national university under the 211 Project and a Double First-Class construction university, located in Xining, Qinghai Province. It is a comprehensive public undergraduate institution. As a key university in the western region, its medical programs have strong influence within the area, but its recognition in Zhejiang Province is relatively limited, representing a typical case of a central-western university recruiting in eastern coastal provinces.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs nationwide continue to maintain high application popularity, with core programs like clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Qinghai University is located in the northwest, and its geographical location has relatively weak appeal to Zhejiang candidates. However, due to the stable employment prospects of medical programs, they still attract a certain number of applicants. In 2026, the overall medical enrollment scale in Zhejiang Province remains stable, and Qinghai University's reduction of 1 spot will slightly intensify competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trend analysis, the minimum admission ranking for Qinghai University's medical category in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is predicted to be 88141, with a fluctuation range of 87741 to 88541. The enrollment reduction causes the ranking to rise compared to 2025 (making it harder to enter), but considering Qinghai University's limited geographical appeal in Zhejiang, the increase is moderate.
